description: Vendor-specific serial number patterns for CPE validation
notes: One row per vendor per material prefix. Pattern uses SAP regex syntax.

description: Aggregated vendor spend per material group per fiscal year
notes: Truncated and rebuilt every night. Source for dual-source concentration check.

description: CPE reorder points and target stock levels per material per plant
notes: Overrides standard MARC-MINBE. CPE team prefers separate table for easier maintenance and audit trail.

description: Calculated vendor performance scores per quarter
notes: Source for vendor_scorecard data product. Historical scores kept for trend analysis.

description: Customer CPE installation details for provisioning
notes: Populated by field technician app when CPE is installed. Links equipment to customer and service parameters.

description: Provisioning request log with status tracking
notes: Status values: PENDING, COMPLETED, FAILED, MANUAL_REVIEW. Retained 12 months then archived.

description: Maximum storage capacity per storage location per material group
notes: Prevents regional warehouse overflow. Zagreb HT10 has effectively unlimited capacity (set to 999999).

description: Authorized materials per plant — controls what can be stored where
notes: Regional warehouses restricted to high-volume CPE only. Enterprise equipment stays in Zagreb.

description: CPE warranty tracking with start and end dates
notes: Claim statuses: ACTIVE (within warranty) EXPIRED CLAIMED (return filed) RESOLVED. Quality team updates claim status manually.

description: Plant to cost center mapping for automatic PO account assignment
notes: Simple 4-row table. Rarely changes. If new plant opened this needs updating or PO gets no cost center.

description: Expected lifecycle months per material type for depreciation calculation
notes: Matches cpe_catalog seed values: routers 48mo, ONTs 60mo, STBs 36mo, switches 72mo, modems 48mo.
